name: Troll Toilet Quest 2
author: Poki
description: Troll Toilet Quest is back for a second, even weirder instalment to the series! Learn how to play a fart organ, breakdance with some flies or become an astronaut - all these adventures and more are waiting in this hilarious point and click game. Don't worry if you get stuck, you can always click the hint button for help! Get ready for more fart-based fun! How to play Troll Toilet Quest 2? Click around to find the solution! Who created Troll Toilet Quest 2? Troll Toilet Quest 2 is made by Stupidella. Play their other game on Poki: Stupidella 1 , Stupidella 2 , Stupidella 4 and Troll Toilet Quest 1 ! How can I play Troll Toilet Quest 2 for free? You can play Troll Toilet Quest 2 for free on Poki. Can I play Troll Toilet Quest 2 on mobile devices and desktop? Troll Toilet Quest 2 can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
